permission_justifications.storage: Used to save user preferences and settings locally so they persist between browser sessions. No data is transmitted externally.
permission_justifications.alarms: Used to schedule periodic background tasks such as reminders or timer notifications.
permission_justifications.notifications: Used to display browser notifications for alerts, timers, or important status updates.

website-monitor-pro.remote_code_declaration: No remote code is executed. All logic runs locally within the extension.

data_usage.data_disclosure: This extension does not collect, transmit, or sell any user data. All processing occurs locally on the user's device.

whois-lookup.name: Whois & DNS Lookup
whois-lookup.single_purpose: Quick DNS and domain info lookup for any website. See IP, registrar, nameservers, and DNS records.

permission_justifications.activeTab: Used to access the current tab's content when the user explicitly activates the extension, enabling it to perform its core function on the active page.
permission_justifications.storage: Used to save user preferences and settings locally so they persist between browser sessions. No data is transmitted externally.

whois-lookup.remote_code_declaration: No remote code is executed. All logic runs locally within the extension.

data_usage.data_disclosure: This extension does not collect, transmit, or sell any user data. All processing occurs locally on the user's device.

word-counter.name: Word & Character Counter for Any Page
word-counter.single_purpose: Instantly count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs on any web page or selected text. Great for writers and SEO.

permission_justifications.activeTab: Used to access the current tab's content when the user explicitly activates the extension, enabling it to perform its core function on the active page.
permission_justifications.storage: Used to save user preferences and settings locally so they persist between browser sessions. No data is transmitted externally.
permission_justifications.scripting: Used to inject the extension's core functionality script into the active tab when the user triggers the extension.

word-counter.remote_code_declaration: No remote code is executed. All logic runs locally within the extension.

data_usage.data_disclosure: This extension does not collect, transmit, or sell any user data. All processing occurs locally on the user's device.
